mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_TYPE_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO test_mst ( TEST_NO, TEST_NM, TEST_DESC, WRTR_EMP_NO, REG_DTM ) VALUES ( #{testNo}, #{testNm}, #{testDesc}, #{wrtrEmpNo}, SYSDATE )

SELECT SEQ_ITEM_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO question_item ( ITEM_NO, QST_NO, ITEM_CN, ITEM_TYPE ) VALUES ( #{itemNo}, #{qstNo}, #{itemCn}, #{itemType} )
INSERT INTO behavior_type ( TYPE_NO, TYPE_CD, TYPE_NM, TYPE_CN, TEST_NO ) VALUES ( SEQ_TYPE_NO.NEXTVAL, #{typeCd}, #{typeNm}, #{typeCn}, #{testNo} )
mapper.select: SELECT TEST_NO, TEST_NM, TEST_DESC, WRTR_EMP_NO, REG_DTM, MOD_DTM FROM test_mst
SELECT QST_NO, TEST_NO, QST_NM FROM question
SELECT ITEM_NO, QST_NO, ITEM_CN, ITEM_TYPE FROM question_item
SELECT TYPE_NO, TYPE_CD, TYPE_NM, TYPE_CN, TEST_NO FROM behavior_type
mapper.update: UPDATE TEST_MST SET TEST_NM = #{testNm}, TEST_DESC = #{testDesc}, MOD_DTM = SYSDATE WHERE TEST_NO = #{testNo}
mapper.select: SELECT qi.ITEM_NO FROM QUESTION_ITEM qi JOIN QUESTION q ON q.QST_NO = qi.QST_NO WHERE q.TEST_NO = #{testNo}
